content: Marina: You see that fuckin’ blood splatter near the market? Some poor bastard got his throat slit and his cock ripped off. Bet he tried stiffing a whore. Serves the stupid cunt right. Olivia: Ugh, fuckin’ disgusting. Though I swear, I saw a Draugr going to town on his corpse afterwards. Those rotten bastards really don’t give a shit, do they? Marina: Ha! At least they’re efficient. Waste not, want not, right? Gods, I love this fucked-up place. Nothing like watching the world burn while I light the fuse. Olivia: You’re twisted, Marina. Then again, that’s why I keep you around—entertainment value. That and your fire magic’s saved my ass more times than I can count. Marina: Flattery won’t get you out of paying me back for that last bandit raid. You still owe me a bottle of Black-Briar and a good stiff fuck after I roasted those idiots. Olivia: Deal. But only if you promise not to burn my tits off this time. Last time, I could barely sit for a week.

Marina: Tch, your tits are too perfect to scorch, Olivia. Even I’m not cruel. Olivia: Bullshit. You’d torch anything just to watch it scream. But fine, I’ll bring the mead and a healing potion—just in case. Marina: Smart woman. Now let’s go find someone else’s misfortune to laugh at before the night gets boring. Olivia: Lead the way, you psychotic little spark-thrower. Dibella knows someone’s getting wrecked tonight—if not by us, then by some horned-up Falmer. Marina: Fuck yes. Chaos waits for no one.
